audit_items.proof_trace: The `module` pointer (obtained from `script->GetFirstModule()` at line 94) is declared inside the `if (Succeeded(result))` block that spans lines 93–108, so it goes out of scope before `delete script` at line 110 and is never dereferenced after the free. `delete script` is the sole delete site; `parse_wast` transfers ownership unconditionally via `*out_script = parser.script` and never deletes the script itself when `out_script` is non-null. No double-free is possible.
